articles.title: 伊朗战事实时更新：巴基斯坦调停人抵达伊朗维系和谈进程

articles.summary_original: The diplomacy came as the White House dismissed reports that President Trump wanted to extend the cease-fire, while still expressing optimism that talks could yield an agreement.

articles.title: 全职岗位增加 澳大利亚失业率维持在4.3%
articles.title_original: Australia Unemployment Holds at 4.3% Even as Full-Time Jobs Jump
articles.summary: 三月份澳大利亚失业率维持稳定，保持在4.3%。尽管美以对伊朗战事引发市场冲击，推高燃料价格，进一步加剧通胀压力，但该国招聘活动仍持续推进，全职岗位数量实现增长。
articles.summary_original: Australian unemployment held steady in March as hiring persisted in the face of shockwaves from the US-Israeli war on Iran, which has driven up fuel prices and given another leg up to inflationary pressures.

articles.title: 伊朗：美国封锁霍尔木兹海峡或导致停火协议破裂 - 新京报
articles.summary: 近期美军称已完全切断伊朗海上进出口贸易，伊朗方面表态，美国若封锁霍尔木兹海峡，或将导致停火协议破裂。针对封锁威胁，伊朗已准备应对方案，将使用替代港口绕开霍尔木兹海峡封锁，特朗普称接下来两天局势将会非常精彩。

articles.title: AI热潮推动 台湾股市总市值突破4万亿美元 超越英国
articles.title_original: Taiwan Market Cap Tops $4 Trillion on AI Boom, Overtaking UK
articles.summary: AI热潮持续升温，叠加市场普遍预期伊朗战事将进一步降级，中国台湾地区科技企业重获资本青睐，当地股市总市值突破4万亿美元，整体规模成功超越英国。
articles.summary_original: Taiwan overtook the UK in stock market value as the island’s tech firms regained favor amid hopes for further de-escalation in the Iran war.

articles.title: 甘肃“统筹发展和安全 护航‘十五五’新征程”主题展览开展 - 新华网

articles.title: 跑赢98%同行的印度基金押注国防股

articles.summary_original: A $3 billion fund at Kotak Mahindra Asset Management Co. is backing Indian defense stocks, wagering that geopolitical tensions will boost local arms production and support the government’s efforts to lower reliance on imports.

articles.title: 马来西亚计划采用大亨阿明开发的外籍务工新体系

articles.summary: 据六名知情人士透露，马来西亚正计划采用一套全新的外籍务工人员招聘体系，该体系由劳工大亨阿明努尔·伊斯兰创办的Bestinet私人有限公司开发，将服务于马来西亚外籍劳工的招募管理工作。
articles.summary_original: Malaysia is planning to adopt a new foreign worker recruitment system developed by Bestinet Sdn., the company founded by labor tycoon Aminul Islam, according to six people familiar with the matter.

articles.title: 为何美伊和平协议或需数月才能达成
articles.title_original: Why a US-Iran Peace Agreement Could Take Months To Seal
articles.summary: 美国外交关系委员会的琳达·罗宾逊接受彭博电视台采访时表示，美伊达成和平协议大概率需要数月时间谈判，且需依托复杂的技术磋商；霍尔木兹海峡若长期关闭，实施难度极大，相关消息来源于彭博社。
articles.summary_original: The Council on Foreign Relation's Linda Robinson tells Bloomberg TV a peace deal between the US and Iran would likely require months of negotiation and rely on complex on technical discussions, and that keeping the Strait of Hormuz closed for such an extended time period would be very difficult. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 3月中国外汇购汇规模创历史新高
